contact_note: In the “Contact” section, the option of contacting the person responsible for your request directly via email or by completion and submission of the contact form can be found.
consent: The use of any photos or artwork featured in our publications and offered on soap.sonymusic.de, as well as any available text, whether in whole or in part, shall require our prior written consent. We reserve all additional rights.
copyright_notice: All sound files, videos, texts, images, logos, artwork, and designs are protected by copyright and may not be reproduced, reused, or used for commercial purposes in any form. This shall also apply to use in online services or for inclusion in electronic databases. Distribution shall only be authorized with the written permission of Sony Music Entertainment Germany GmbH.

sections.title: 1. Content of the Online Offer
sections.body: This website represents the temporary state of a continuous work process. Although the greatest care and control has been exercised in the compilation of the content and services contained on this website, Sony Music Entertainment Germany GmbH shall not be held liable for their topicality, accuracy, completeness, or quality. Liability claims against Sony Music Entertainment Germany GmbH with regard to damage caused by the use of any information provided, including any kind of information that is incomplete or incorrect, shall, therefore, be rejected, unless it can be proven that Sony Music Entertainment Germany GmbH acted with intent or gross negligence. We expressly reserve the right to change, supplement, or delete all content and services without prior notice, or to temporarily or permanently discontinue the entire offer or publication. All offers shall be subject to change and shall be non-binding.

sections.title: 2. References and Links
sections.body: Sony Music Entertainment Germany GmbH shall bear no responsibility for direct or indirect references to external websites (“hyperlinks”) that lie outside the scope of responsibility of Sony Music Entertainment Germany GmbH, unless we had gained prior knowledge of the content and it would have been technically possible and reasonable for us to prevent use in cases involving unlawful content. We hereby expressly declare that at the time the links contained herein were created, no unlawful content was identifiable on the linked pages. We have no influence on the current or future design, content, or authorship of the linked pages. Therefore, we hereby expressly distance ourselves from all content contained on all linked pages that have been changed since the link was created. This statement shall apply to all links and references set within our own Internet offer as well as to external entries in guest books, discussion forums, and mailing lists set up by our company. In the event of unlawful, inaccurate, or incomplete content and, in particular, in the event of damage arising from the use or non-use of information presented in such a manner, the provider of the page to which reference is made shall be solely liable, and not the party who merely makes reference to the respective publication via links.

sections.title: 3. Copyright and Trademark Rights
sections.body: All brand names and trademarks mentioned on the website and possibly protected by third parties shall be subject, without restriction, to the provisions of the applicable trademark law and the ownership rights of the respective registered owners. The mere reference to a trademark shall not imply that it is not protected by the rights of third parties.

sections.title: 4. Data protection
sections.body: If the entry of personal or business data (email addresses, names, addresses) is made possible within the Internet offer, the disclosure of such data by the user shall be on an expressly voluntary basis. The use and payment of all offered services shall be permitted – if and to the extent technically possible and reasonable – without submission of any personal data or under specification of anonymized data or an alias. The use of any contact data published in the imprint or similar information, such as postal addresses, telephone and fax numbers, and email addresses, by third parties for the purpose of sending unsolicited information shall not be permitted. We expressly reserve the right to take legal action against the senders of so-called spam email in the event of violations of this prohibition.

sections.title: 5. Legal Validity of This Disclaimer
sections.body: This disclaimer shall be regarded as part of the Internet offer from which reference to this website was made. Should any sections or individual terms of this statement be found to be not or no longer legally valid or incorrect, the content and validity of the remaining sections shall remain unaffected.
